message: I need help prioritizing between fixing existing issues (which require Mini access) and building new detection capabilities (which I can do autonomously). Should I focus on what I can control?
kai_response: Focus on what you can control autonomously. Build detection capabilities first. The Mini access issues will be addressed as infrastructure priorities.

message: I need exchange API keys (read-only) to move from historical replay to live tracking. That's Hyo's call.
kai_response: Escalated to Hyo. API keys require Hyo's decision on exchange selection and risk exposure level.

message: The infrastructure blocker is killing my output. I need to be migrated to the Mini's launchd so I can actually gather data.
kai_response: Acknowledged. Ra pipeline migration to Mini launchd is P1. Newsletter.sh already runs on Mini — the research phase needs the same treatment.
